use_cases: Hero section full-page animated background with organic fluid particle motion
Landing page visual enhancement with Perlin noise-driven particle animation
Full-width section backdrop with customizable particle density and size
Gaming or creative tool interface atmospheric background
Corporate or portfolio website immersive visual layer
ai_summary: An animated fluid particle background component using Perlin noise algorithms for organic, flowing particle movement. Renders customizable particles with configurable count, size range, and noise intensity. Designed as a full-page or section backdrop with a dark cyber aesthetic and gradient color effects. Suitable for hero sections, landing pages, and immersive web experiences requiring atmospheric visual depth.
